description_long: This is a low-cut, athletic-style shoe with a predominantly black synthetic upper and a white, thick rubber sole. The shoe features a quick-lacing system with a round dial mechanism on the tongue, eliminating traditional laces for easy tightening and loosening. The interior is lined with a bright orange fabric that has a geometric pattern, providing both comfort and a striking visual contrast. The side of the shoe displays the brand name 'Sievi' in large orange letters, partially overlaid by a white graphic, and the word 'Racer' is printed near the heel. The heel includes a pull tab for easy wearing, and the outsole is orange, visible from the rear and side views. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A black, low-cut athletic shoe with a quick-lacing dial, orange patterned lining, and bold 'Sievi' branding on the side. Features a thick white sole and orange accents for a sporty, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, black upper, and the prominent quick-lacing dial on the tongue.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the low profile, orange patterned lining, and the quick-lacing system, with a visible pull tab at the heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the orange interior lining, heel pull tab, and the white and orange sole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the large 'Sievi' branding, 'Racer' text near the heel, and the white sole with orange outsole.
attribute_logo: Large orange 'Sievi' text on the outer side, small orange 'Racer' text near the heel.
